changes.reason: Adds a distinct high-value notification troubleshooting cluster covering app notification settings, Focus/Do Not Disturb, scheduled summaries, Apple Intelligence notification presentation, Apple Watch routing, and Messages filtering with reviewed Apple China sources.

queries: 通知只在 Apple Watch 上出现
通知延迟到摘要才出现

canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical articles mention notification symptoms only inside audio, Messages, Family Sharing approval, Screen Time request, or Apple Watch pairing flows. None covers the general notification settings plus Focus, summaries, Apple Watch routing, and Messages filtering troubleshooting intent.
